# Security Policy

We take the security of Strive and its users seriously. If you believe you have
found a security vulnerability, please report it responsibly: email
**security@striveapp.cc** (or open a private
[GitHub security advisory](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing-information-about-vulnerabilities/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability))
with a description of the issue and steps to reproduce. Please do **not** open a
public issue for security problems, and give us a reasonable window to release a
fix before any public disclosure. We will acknowledge your report as quickly as
we can and keep you updated on the resolution.
